channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Ragnarok Console Project Launching on Multiple Platforms
item.description: Gravity and Daweon Game Media Lab announced Ragnarok Console Project for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC. The game is set to launch in the first half of 2027.

item.title: Google Home Speaker Set for June 25 Launch
item.description: Google's Gemini-powered Home Speaker is expected to launch on June 25, 2026, following the Pixel 10a and Fitbit Air. Anticipation builds for its features and capabilities.

item.title: iOS 28 Rumored to Be Major Upgrade
item.description: Bloomberg's Mark Gurman hints that iOS 28 will be significantly more impactful than iOS 27, which is set to be unveiled soon. Details remain scarce but expectations are high.

item.title: NVIDIA's N1x SoC Underwhelms in Geekbench Scores
item.description: Pre-release Geekbench 6 scores for NVIDIA's upcoming N1x processors show disappointing results compared to Apple's M3 Max chip. Details on the processors are still forthcoming.

item.title: California Assembly Passes 'Stop Killing Games' Bill
item.description: California's Assembly passed Bill AB 1921, enhancing protections for games taken offline. This is a significant victory for the Stop Killing Games movement.

item.title: Minecraft Live Unveils Exciting New Features
item.description: Mojang's Minecraft Live event revealed new content including Minecraft Dungeons II and a new biome. Fans are excited about the upcoming updates.

item.title: April 2026's Best-Selling Games Revealed
item.description: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream topped the U.S. sales charts in April 2026, marking a successful debut for the social sim game. Other titles also performed well.
